source.title: 25 AI in Education Statistics to Guide Your Learning Strategy in 2026

verified_claims: 85% of K-12 teachers use AI regularly
92% of higher ed students use generative AI
Teachers save avg 5.9 hours/week using AI (= 6 weeks/year)
AI tutors: 54% higher test scores vs traditional classes
10x engagement increase in AI-enhanced active learning
Only 20% of universities have formal AI policies
31% of US public schools have written AI policy
Faculty concerns: 95% worry about overreliance, 90% about critical thinking decline
fact_check.methodology: Verified against Microsoft 2025 Education Report, Coursera AI in Higher Education Report (Feb 2026), OECD Digital Education Outlook 2026, and Precedence Research market analysis.

draft.headline: 2026년 AI 교육 현황: 교사 85%, 학생 92% 사용하지만, 정책 20% 미만…교육의 패러독스
draft.subheadline: 기술 도입은 빠르고, 정책은 뒤처지고, 격차는 심화되는 AI 교육 현황 분석
